app.name: AccessGrid Sync
login.title: Sign in
login.rate_limited.one: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about 1 minute.
login.rate_limited.many: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about {minutes} minutes.
wizard.title: Setup
wizard.step1.title: Create administrator account
wizard.step1.subtitle: This account is the only way to manage the sync tool. There is no password recovery — pick something you can remember or store it in a password manager.
wizard.step2.title: AccessGrid credentials
wizard.step2.subtitle: Enter your AccessGrid account ID and API secret. We'll test the connection before saving.
wizard.step3.title: Choose your PACS
wizard.step3.subtitle: Select which Physical Access Control System this NUC will sync from.
wizard.step4.title: PACS credentials
wizard.step4.subtitle: Enter the credentials for your PACS. We'll test the connection before saving.
wizard.step5.title: Setup complete
wizard.step5.subtitle: The sync engine will start automatically. Open the Status page to watch the first cycle run.
status.title: Sync status
logs.title: Logs
logs.empty: No log entries match the current filters.
settings.title: Settings
